projectError: Project not found or you don't have access.

columns.renameFailed: Status name must be unique and not empty
columns.deleteEmptyDescription: This status has no tasks and will be removed from the board.
columns.deleteWithTasksDescription: {{count}} task(s) will be moved to another status, then this column will be removed.
columns.deleteLastFailed: Keep at least one status on the board

tasks.deleteDescription: “{{title}}” will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

drawerDescription: Edit task details and GitHub links

labels.empty: No project labels yet. Type a name to create one.
labels.createFailed: Label name must be unique and not empty

boards.createDescription: Adds a kanban board with default columns in this project.
boards.name: Name
boards.baseBranchHint: Default PR target for tasks on this board.
boards.allowedPatternsHint: One pattern per line (e.g. feature/*). Empty = allow any branch. Mismatches warn, they do not block.
boards.settingsDescription: Workflows and Git branch mapping for this project.
boards.deleteDescription: Only empty boards can be deleted. The last board in a project cannot be removed.
boards.deleteHasTasks: Move all tasks off this board first, then come back to delete it.
boards.moveDescription: Choose which column the task should land in on the destination board.

members.title: Members & invites
members.description: Who can access this project and at which role.
members.inviteHint: Creates a link you can copy and send. No email is sent from the app.

invite.notFound: This invite link is invalid or no longer available.
invite.signInFirst: Sign in to accept this invite.
invite.createAccountFirst: Create an account with the invited email (then confirm it), or sign in if you already have one.
invite.emailMismatch: Your account email does not match the invite. Claim it so an owner or admin can confirm you.
invite.claimSuccess: Claimed — ask an owner or admin to confirm in project settings.

labelSettings.title: Labels
labelSettings.description: Labels are shared across tasks. Renaming or recoloring updates every task at once.
labelSettings.emptyDescription: Create a label above to start tagging tasks.
labelSettings.customColorInvalid: Enter a valid hex color, e.g. #6366f1
labelSettings.transfer: Copy or move to another project
labelSettings.deleteWithTasks: This label is used on {{count}} task(s). It will be removed from all of them.
labelSettings.deleteEmpty: This label isn't used on any task and will be permanently removed.
labelSettings.transferDescription: Copy keeps this label here; move removes it from this project and detaches it from its tasks.
labelSettings.transferDuplicate: The target project already has a label with this name

github.title: GitHub
github.noBranch: No branch linked — generate one, link an existing branch, or skip if you work on a shared branch.
github.linkBranchHint: Enter an existing branch name (e.g. feature/TASK-12-login).
github.patternMismatchTitle: Branch does not match this board
github.patternMismatchBody: “{{branch}}” does not match allowed patterns ({{patterns}}). You can still link it, switch boards, or rename the branch.
github.skippedHint: Working without a dedicated branch. Track progress via status or a linked PR.
github.sharedBranchHint: “{{branch}}” is a shared/base branch. Commits and PRs for this task won’t be listed here — use status or link a PR instead.
github.sharedLinkedToast: Linked shared branch “{{branch}}”. Git history is limited for this task.
github.noPrSkipped: No pull request — link one when available, or close the task manually.
github.linkPrHint: Enter a PR number or GitHub URL (e.g. 42 or …/pull/42).
github.prRequired: Enter a valid PR number or URL
github.prNeedsGithub: Connect GitHub and link a repository to look up pull requests
github.prNotFound: Pull request #{{number}} was not found in this repository

git.noPrs: No pull requests for this branch
git.selectFile: Select a file from the list
git.sharedBranchBody: “{{branch}}” is shared across tasks. Full commit/PR lists are hidden to avoid noise. Prefer a task-specific branch, or track this work via PR and board status.
git.diffLoadFailed: Could not load pull request files
git.noFiles: No files changed in this pull request

richText.hint: Select text to format, or type “/” for blocks

link.title: Add link
link.description: Enter a URL to link the selected text. Leave empty to remove the link.
link.label: URL

media.unsupportedType: Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP are supported
media.tooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller
media.uploadUnavailable: Image upload is not available here
